acceptance_criteria.text: Generated Template_3 workbooks contain no cells with solid red fill/highlight.

proof.command: Synthetic workbook generation and full style inspection.
proof.summary: Generated workbook red fill count was 0.

acceptance_criteria.text: Non-red structural fills, such as blue/green header backgrounds, are preserved.

proof.command: Synthetic red/non-red fill cleanup helper check.
proof.summary: Red fill was removed while green and blue fills were preserved.
Generated workbook preserved FFE2F0D9 and FFD9EAF7 header fills.

acceptance_criteria.text: The source Template_3_with_frames.xlsx file is not edited; cleanup happens only during generated workbook creation.

proof.summary: Source template still had 5 red fills while generated workbook had 0.

acceptance_criteria.text: Existing report formulas, values, images, row fitting, and transcript/scoring logic remain unchanged except for red fill removal.

proof.summary: Implementation is scoped to red solid fill removal before generated workbook save.

acceptance_criteria.text: Focused checks prove Python syntax, red-fill detection/removal, generated workbook styling, and diff hygiene.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: Generate a Template_3 workbook and inspect every worksheet for solid red fills.
Confirm non-red header fills remain in generated workbook.
known_gaps: Existing .xlsx files are not modified; reports must be regenerated.
Excel/LibreOffice rendering was not opened manually; workbook styles were inspected structurally with openpyxl.
